name: ReportScheduler

neutralConcepts: scheduleAt must be in the future at time of scheduling — past scheduleAt is rejected
Report configurations are FREEDOM config — tenant-editable
DNA-8: storeDocument() BEFORE enqueue() for scheduled report jobs

ironRules.rule: scheduleAt MUST be in the future at time of scheduling. Past scheduleAt must be rejected with failure — never silently accepted.
DNA-8: storeDocument(scheduledReport) BEFORE enqueue(ReportScheduled). Enqueue before store is a BUILD_FAILURE.
Report configurations are FREEDOM config — tenant-editable via warehouse_report_schedule_config.

keywords: report scheduler scheduleAt future DNA-8 storeDocument before enqueue FREEDOM config ReportScheduled warehouse.report.scheduled
